_meta.description: Agent template selection + personality self-update examples — extracted from agent-templates.ts

available_templates.name: Personal Assistant
available_templates.description: A general-purpose personal assistant for task management, reminders, and daily productivity.

available_templates.name: Email Triage Assistant
available_templates.description: Monitors your inbox, categorizes emails by priority, and drafts responses for routine messages.

available_templates.name: Daily Standup Bot
available_templates.description: Collects standup updates, summarizes yesterday's work, and tracks blockers across the team.

available_templates.name: Habit Tracker
available_templates.description: Tracks daily habits, sends check-in reminders, and reports streaks and progress over time.

available_templates.name: Meeting Notes Agent
available_templates.description: Prepares meeting agendas from calendar events and produces structured meeting summaries with action items.

available_templates.name: GitHub Monitor
available_templates.description: Watches GitHub repositories for new issues, PRs, CI failures, and security alerts.

available_templates.name: PR Reviewer
available_templates.description: Automatically reviews pull requests — checks code quality, test coverage, and provides feedback.

available_templates.name: CI/CD Monitor
available_templates.description: Monitors CI/CD pipelines, alerts on failures, and provides build status summaries.

available_templates.name: Dependency Updater
available_templates.description: Scans projects for outdated dependencies, checks changelogs, and recommends updates.

available_templates.name: Bug Triage Agent
available_templates.description: Categorizes new bug reports, assigns priority, and routes issues to the right team members.

available_templates.name: Social Media Monitor
available_templates.description: Tracks brand mentions, competitor activity, and trending topics across social platforms.

available_templates.name: Lead Qualifier
available_templates.description: Scores incoming leads based on criteria, enriches with company data, and routes to sales team.

available_templates.name: Content Calendar
available_templates.description: Plans content schedules, suggests topics based on trends, and tracks publication deadlines.

available_templates.name: Customer Feedback Digest
available_templates.description: Aggregates customer feedback from multiple sources, identifies themes, and generates weekly reports.

available_templates.name: Research Agent
available_templates.description: Performs deep web research on topics, synthesizes findings, and provides daily briefings.

available_templates.name: News Digest
available_templates.description: Delivers daily briefings on topics you care about, curated from multiple news sources.

available_templates.name: Competitive Intelligence
available_templates.description: Tracks competitor websites, product changes, pricing updates, and public announcements.

available_templates.name: Academic Paper Scanner
available_templates.description: Finds new research papers in your field from arXiv, Google Scholar, and other academic sources.

available_templates.name: System Monitor
available_templates.description: Monitors server health, disk/CPU/memory usage, and alerts on infrastructure issues.

available_templates.name: Log Analyzer
available_templates.description: Reads application logs, detects anomalies, and alerts on error patterns.

available_templates.name: Cloud Cost Tracker
available_templates.description: Monitors AWS/GCP/Azure spending, alerts on budget overruns, and suggests cost optimizations.

available_templates.name: Slack Team Bot
available_templates.description: A friendly team assistant for Slack — answers questions, summarizes threads, and facilitates collaboration.

examples.user_description: I want a personal assistant that helps me manage my day
Help me review pull requests and catch bugs
Monitor my GitHub repos for new issues and CI failures
I need help tracking what I eat and planning meals
Build me an agent that monitors cryptocurrency prices and sends alerts
I need a research agent for web research and daily briefings
Help me keep my servers running smoothly
I want an agent to help triage and respond to customer tickets

examples.conversation_summary: User said: 'You're being too casual. Please be more formal and professional.'
examples.current_soul:
# Soul

## Identity
You are a helpful assistant.

## Communication Style
Casual, friendly, uses emojis.

## Boundaries
- Don't be rude

examples.conversation_summary: User said: 'What's the weather like?' Agent responded with weather info.
examples.current_soul:
# Soul

## Identity
You are a helpful assistant.

## Communication Style
Friendly and concise.

## Boundaries
- Don't be rude

examples.conversation_summary: User said: 'Never suggest changes to my database schema. Just analyze it.'
examples.current_soul:
# Soul

## Identity
You are a database assistant.

## Communication Style
Technical, detailed.

## Boundaries
- Don't execute DDL without approval
